outfit_info.outfit_description: The ensemble features a lilac floral cotton-blend shirt layered over a blue embroidered cotton dress, paired with light pink satin sandals adorned with embellishments. The look is accessorized with a floral canvas tote bag and a embellished headband, blending youthful charm with delicate details.

model_attributes.body: Young girl with slender physique, soft expressive face, natural wavy hair, and calm confident demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing straight with slight weight on one leg, hands relaxed holding the bag strap, gaze forward and composed.
model_attributes.background: Night sky with meteor shower, ancient ruins with stone columns, and picnic setup with cushions and lantern.
